papers.title_en: Citation-Aware Continual Pre-Training for Biomedical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对生物医学领域预训练语言模型忽略文献引用关系的问题，提出了一种引用感知的持续预训练方法。通过将论文间的引用链接这一结构化知识整合到模型训练中，增强了模型捕捉科学研究间关联的能力。该方法在生物医学自然语言处理任务中表现优异，证明了利用文献引用结构提升模型性能的有效性。
papers.abstract_en: The biomedical literature contains rich structured knowledge, including citation linksthat encode relationships between scientific studies, but such information is typicallyignored in standard language model pre-training. We propose a citation-aware …

papers.title_en: Context-Aware Reasoner: Enhancing Contextual Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）过度依赖内部知识而忽视给定背景信息的问题，本文提出了“上下文感知推理器”（CAR）。该研究旨在增强模型基于相关上下文进行逻辑推演的能力，通过引入专门的推理机制，显著提升了模型在复杂多模态场景下的理解与应用水平，为解决MLLM在特定语境下的推理局限性提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkablereasoning capabilities over internalized knowledge. However, current researchoverlooks contextual reasoning, the ability to reason based on the relevant …

papers.title_en: LoopCoder: Scaling Code Intelligence via Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在复杂算法推理方面的局限性，本文提出了 LoopCoder。该模型借鉴了通用 Transformer 的思想，通过循环利用模型层（Looped Language Models）来提升代码智能。这种方法在不显著增加参数量的情况下，通过增加计算深度增强了模型的逻辑推理能力，为提升代码生成和算法理解提供了新的扩展路径，实现了更高效的性能扩展。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have mastered syntax-level code generation,complex algorithmic reasoning remains a challenge, typically addressed by scalingmodel depth and parameter count. Universal Transformers (UT) offer a compelling …

papers.title_en: Beyond Single View: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Medical Multimodal Large Language Models on Multi-Image Understanding
papers.tldr: 针对现有医学多模态大模型（MLLM）侧重单图理解而忽视临床多视角诊断需求的问题，本文提出了一个全新的综合基准测试，旨在评估模型在多图像医学场景下的理解能力。该研究填补了多图医学评估的空白，通过系统性测试揭示了当前模型在复杂临床场景中的局限性，为开发更符合实际医疗需求的多模态模型提供了重要参考和评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs)have demonstrated impressive capabilities in interpreting single medical images.However, real-world clinical diagnosis is intrinsically a multi-view process, requiring …

papers.title_en: OmniPathoVQA: Benchmarking Pathology Vision-Language Models with Encyclopedia-Scale Knowledge
papers.tldr: 本研究针对病理视觉语言模型（VLM）在临床应用中缺乏严谨评估的问题，提出了OmniPathoVQA基准测试。该基准利用百科全书规模的知识，为病理VLM提供了一个全面且具有临床意义的评估框架。通过这一工具，研究者可以更准确地衡量模型在复杂临床决策支持中的表现，有效推动了病理AI向实际临床部署的迈进。
papers.abstract_en: Pathology vision-language models (VLMs) are promising for building the clinicaldecision support systems. However, a key barrier to real-world clinical deploymentlies in the lack of rigorous and clinically meaningful model evaluation. Existing …

papers.title_en: MedAct: Removing the Human Bottleneck in Benchmarking Clinical LLM Safety
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前临床大模型评估过度依赖多选题和人工评估的局限性，提出了 MedAct 框架。该框架旨在消除临床安全基准测试中的人工瓶颈，通过模拟真实临床环境而非简单的选项选择，实现了更高效、更贴近实战的安全性评估，为医疗大模型的安全部署提供了自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Most medical benchmarks for large language models test factual recall throughmultiple-choice questions, but on-the-ground physicians do not have the luxury offour options to choose from. NOHARM (Wu et al., 2025) demonstrated this limitation …

papers.title_en: DTop-p MoE: Sparsity-Controlled Dynamic Top-p MoE for Foundation Model Pre-training
papers.tldr: 针对稀疏混合专家模型（MoE）中固定Top-k路由忽略Token难度差异和层间计算需求不同的问题，本文提出DTop-p MoE。该方法通过动态Top-p路由实现稀疏度控制，允许模型根据Token复杂度和层级特征动态分配专家数量。实验证明该方法在保持计算效率的同时，显著提升了基础模型预训练的性能和灵活性。
papers.abstract_en: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures are essential for scaling model capacityefficiently, yet the standard Top-$ k $ routing imposes a rigid sparsity pattern thatignores the intrinsic variance in token difficulty and layer-specific computational …

papers.title_en: Improved computer-aided detection performance for pulmonary embolism on CTPA with higher noise reduction reconstruction
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估图像降噪技术对CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）中计算机辅助检测（CAD）系统识别肺栓塞（PE）性能的影响。通过对比不同降噪强度的重建图像，研究发现更高程度的降噪能有效减少图像噪声干扰，从而显著提升CAD软件检测肺栓塞的敏感性和准确性。这一发现为优化临床PE筛查流程提供了技术依据，证明了先进重建算法在辅助诊断中的重要价值。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To investigate whether a higher image noise reduction improves thediagnostic accuracy of Computer-Aided Detection (CAD) software to detectpulmonary embolism (PE) on CT pulmonary angiography (CTPA). Methods We …

papers.title_en: Radiomics Assessment of Iliac Bone Marrow on Prostate MRI Discriminates Monoclonal Gammopathy of Undetermined Significance with and Without Concomitant …
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用前列腺MRI中的髂骨骨髓影像组学特征，来区分伴有或不伴有相关并发症的意义未明单克隆丙种球蛋白病（MGUS）。针对放射科医师工作量激增及报告积压的现状，研究通过自动化的影像组学评估方法，旨在提高诊断效率并减轻临床负担，为血液系统疾病的早期筛查和精准管理提供了新的影像学辅助手段。
papers.abstract_en: Imaging demand is growing faster than the radiology workforce can expand, andreporting backlogs cannot be resolved through training and recruitment alone. Themost direct opportunity is reducing the time and effort radiologists spend producing …

papers.title_en: Radiomic correlates with overall survival in glioblastoma: amide proton transfer (APT) imaging-based feature analysis and integration of clinical factors
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了基于酰胺质子转移（APT）成像的影像组学特征在预测胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）患者总生存期中的价值。研究通过提取APT图像的组学特征，并整合患者年龄、MGMT启动子甲基化状态等关键临床因素，分析了其与预后的相关性。结果表明，APT影像组学特征是生存期的重要预测因子，结合临床生物标志物可显著提升预后评估的准确性，为GBM的个体化治疗提供了新的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: This study identifies amide proton transfer (APT) imaging radiomic features thatcorrelate with glioblastoma survival and explore the relationship of combinedradiomic data and biomarkers such as age and MGMT methylation status to survival …

papers.title_en: DCCD: Dual-contrastive channel disentanglement for single-source domain generalization in medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医疗图像分割中因设备和协议差异导致的领域偏移问题，本文提出了一种双对比通道解耦（DCCD）框架。该方法通过在通道维度上解耦领域不变特征和领域特定特征，并利用双对比学习增强特征的判别性，显著提升了模型在单源域泛化（SSDG）任务中的表现，为医疗影像的跨中心应用提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning models for medical image segmentation often exhibit poorgeneralization performance due to domain shifts stemming from variations inimaging devices and protocols. Single-Source Domain Generalization (SSDG) …

papers.title_en: CAAD: Contrastive Audio-Aware Distillation for Efficient Speech Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对语音语言模型（SLM）参数量庞大且易忽视声学特征的问题，本文提出了一种名为 CAAD 的对比音频感知蒸馏方法。该方法利用对比解码技术，将大模型的声学接地能力有效迁移至轻量化模型中，使其在减少计算开销的同时，能更好地平衡语言先验与音频特征。实验证明，CAAD 显著提升了高效 SLM 的性能，为实现低资源下的高质量语音推理奠定了基础。
papers.abstract_en: Speech Language Models achieve reasoning capabilities, but are often hindered bymassive parameter counts and a tendency to prioritize linguistic priors over acousticfeatures. While contrastive decoding enhances grounding by contrasting audio …

papers.title_en: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate: Testing Reasoning Against Priors
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在揭示大语言模型产生幻觉的深层机制，重点探讨了模型内部先验知识与提示词推理之间的冲突。研究者通过对比实验分析了模型在拥有相关知识的情况下为何仍会违反约束。结果表明，幻觉往往源于模型过度依赖预训练阶段形成的先验偏见，而非单纯的知识匮乏。这一发现对于理解模型失效模式及提升其遵循指令的忠实度具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models often produce hallucinated answers that violate prompt-levelconstraints. A key diagnostic question is whether these failures reflect missingknowledge, or whether the model has the relevant information but follows the wrong …

papers.title_en: GRCD: Grounded Region Change Detection for Multi-Finding Chest X-Ray Pairs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线影像（CXR）的随访对比需求，提出了GRCD（定位区域变化检测）框架。该方法通过对前后影像对进行深度分析，能够同时在多个解剖区域内定位病变，并准确识别其随时间的变化状态（如进展、改善或稳定）。GRCD不仅提升了多项发现的检测精度，还通过区域定位增强了结果的可解释性，为自动化生成放射科随访报告提供了关键的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Radiologists routinely compare current and prior chest X-rays to track diseaseprogression, producing follow-up reports that describe multiple findings, eachlocalised to an anatomical region and annotated with a temporal change status …

papers.title_en: CogRad: A Cognitively-Inspired Multi-Agent Framework for Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对现有放射科报告生成系统缺乏验证机制的问题，本文提出CogRad框架。该框架受人类认知启发，采用多智能体协作模式，模拟放射科医生在撰写报告时的核查与修正过程。通过引入多轮交互机制，CogRad能够针对图像核实陈述并动态调整发现，显著提升了报告的准确性与逻辑一致性，为自动化医疗诊断提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) can ease radiologist workload, yetmost existing systems produce a report in a single forward pass, with no mechanismto check a claim against the image or revisit a finding once stated. We present …

papers.title_en: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）通过并行去噪生成文本，是自回归模型的有力替代，但在通过后训练提升推理能力方面面临挑战。本文提出了 dOPSD（同策略自蒸馏）方法，通过在模型自身的生成分布上进行自蒸馏，有效增强了扩散模型的推理性能。该研究为 dLLMs 的优化提供了新路径，使其在复杂任务中表现更佳。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising amasked sequence, offering a parallel alternative to autoregressive models, buteliciting strong reasoning through post-training remains difficult: supervised fine …

papers.title_en: Harrison. Rad 1.5 Technical Report: A radiology foundation model that can draft reports from images, priors and clinical context
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生短缺和报告积压问题，推出了Harrison. Rad 1.5放射学基础模型。该模型能够整合医学影像、历史影像及临床背景信息，自动生成放射报告草稿。作为一种多模态基础模型，它旨在通过自动化报告撰写流程，显著降低放射科医生的工作负担并提高诊断效率，是缓解医疗资源紧张的重要技术尝试。
papers.abstract_en: Imaging demand is growing faster than the radiology workforce can expand, andreporting backlogs cannot be resolved through training and recruitment alone. Themost direct opportunity is reducing the time and effort radiologists spend producing …

papers.title_en: OBBSeg: Irregular Lesion Segmentation under Oriented Bounding Box Annotations
papers.tldr: 针对医疗影像分割中像素级标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出OBBSeg框架，利用定向边界框（OBB）作为弱监督信号。该方法通过OBB提供的方向和紧凑性约束，引导模型学习不规则病灶的分割，有效缓解了传统弱监督方法约束不足的问题，在显著降低标注成本的同时，实现了对复杂形状病灶的高精度分割。
papers.abstract_en: Pixel-level annotation remains a major bottleneck in medical image segmentation,making weak supervision an attractive yet under-constrained alternative. Wepropose OBBSeg, an intermediate supervision paradigm guided by Oriented …

papers.title_en: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Calcification Classification in Mammography Across Multi-Site Datasets
papers.tldr: 本研究针对乳腺X射线摄影中钙化分类面临的跨中心数据域偏移问题，提出了一种无监督领域自适应（UDA）框架。通过在无标注的目标域数据上进行迁移学习，该方法有效提升了模型在不同医疗机构数据集上的泛化性能。研究证明了该方案在无需额外标注的情况下，能显著改善多站点乳腺癌辅助诊断系统的准确性与鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning-based computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems have shown strongperformance in breast cancer diagnosis, particularly for classification tasks inmammography. However, domain shifts across multi-site datasets remain a …
